title: [MTR4] JR Kyushu 305 Series | JR九州305系
description: JR Kyushu 305 Series for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview

The JR Kyushu 305 series is a narrow-gauge DC electric multiple unit (EMU) operating on the JR Kyushu Chikuhi line and the Fukuoka City Subway Kuko (Airport) Line. Introduced in 2015, a total of 36 vehicles amounting to six train sets were constructed. The 305 series consumes 57% less power than its predecessor, the 103-1500 series, due to the use of permanent magnet synchronous motors (PMSM) in the train's traction system.

This resource pack adds the 305 series into the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with custom model and textures.

The real-world formation of the train is as follows, however you may configure the train as you like. Each car is 20 blocks long.

- Cab forwards
- Trailer
- Pantograph Trailer
- Trailer
- Pantograph Trailer
- Cab Backwards
